title: Playground Portability Ledger
concept: A table-led import and export hub that treats every Playground as a portable work item, with browser saves, local directory saves, GitHub export, zip import, and Blueprint bundles visible from the first screen.
focus: distinct launch route inputs and consequences
separate browser and local directory save states
flows: select a launch source from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import
save a temporary Playground to browser storage or to a local directory with visible copy progress and resulting saved identity
resume, rename, delete, export, download, or import over Playgrounds from the portability ledger
open Site Manager tools for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database, logs, and additional actions
search and filter Blueprint catalog entries, inspect a selected Blueprint, copy its URL, download its bundle, or run it
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
